hybrid_scaling.description: BLKH v5.8 hybrid mode scaling: image size vs ZIP advantage
hybrid_scaling.note: Advantage grows 128->512 then plateaus at 1024 (SIREN capacity limit)

combo_scaling.description: BLKH v5.9 combo mode scaling: N=10 images at different sizes vs ZIP
combo_scaling.sweet_spot: Advantage grows monotonically with size (ideal for datacenter)
combo_scaling.note: Combo advantage keeps growing — 256x256 gives 3.09x, likely 3.5x+ at 512x512

key_findings: Hybrid mode: sweet spot 256-512px (4.0-4.5x vs ZIP, bit-perfect)
Combo mode: advantage grows with size (2.3x -> 3.1x from 64 to 256px)
At 1024x1024, need h=128 SIREN (h=64 underfits, h=256 overfits weights)
